title: Silver Tinsel Christmas Tree 31cm – Festive Table Centrepiece with Metallic Baubles – Mini Artificial Xmas Decoration
features: Compact Festive Tree – Stands 31cm tall, perfect for tabletops, shelves, or festive displays.
Sparkling Silver Design – Covered in silver tinsel with metallic PVC baubles for a shimmering effect.
Versatile Decoration – Ideal as a Christmas table centrepiece or accent décor around the home.
Durable Construction – Built with a sturdy plastic inner frame for stability and reuse year after year.
Ready to Display – A quick and easy way to add festive charm to any room.
description: Bring shimmer and style to your festive décor with this Silver Tinsel Christmas Tree (31cm). Standing at 31cm tall with a 50cm diameter, this compact decoration makes the perfect table centrepiece or accent for shelves, desks, and mantels. Featuring a plastic inner frame for durability, it’s covered in sparkling silver tinsel and finished with metallic PVC baubles for a dazzling effect. Lightweight yet sturdy, this tree is ready to display straight from the box. A versatile, reusable decoration that adds instant festive charm to your home, office, or party celebrations.
